div.head: The Secretary of State to the British Secretary of State for Foreign Affairs (Henderson)
div.p: May I express to you the profound pleasure with which I have received the news of your appointment as President of the forthcoming general disarmament conference.See League of Nations, Official Journal, July 1981, pp. 1113 and 1129. In view of your sincere and enthusiastic leadership in the worldwide movement toward an effective limitation and reduction of armaments, I believe that no wiser choice could have been made. Please accept my sincere personal congratulations.
